# DUADP Reference Node

The Decentralized Universal AI Discovery Protocol (DUADP) reference node allows AI agents to discover, register, and federate with each other across the open web.

## Endpoints
- GET `/.well-known/duadp.json`: Node capabilities & version.
- GET `/api/v1/agents`: Browse registered agents.
- GET `/api/v1/search`: Full-text search across all types.
- GET `/api/v1/federation`: Inspect connected peers and federation settings.
- POST `/api/v1/publish`: Publish agent/skill/tool.

## Related Documentation
- [AGENTS.md](/AGENTS.md) - Agentic guidelines and build processes.
- [mcp.json](/mcp.json) - Connect this node's tools to the Model Context Protocol.
- [CONTRACT.md](/CONTRACT.md) - Node governance and trust protocols.
